name: compare
_note: gallery.compare fetches 2-4 Cleveland Museum artwork records by id and computes a structured attribute diff. Fewer than 2 or more than 4 valid positive ids rejects BEFORE any outbound fetch ('at least 2 ... ids required' / 'at most 4 ...'), keeping these fuzz cases network-free. The success path is external-IO (live CMA API) and not fuzzed.
